'''√k-dh-w''' ('''kadhawa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yodle|yodle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yodle|yodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √k-dh-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadhawa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kadhawithi|kadhawithi]] || [[word:kadhawiji|kadhawiji]] || [[word:kadhawishi|kadhawishi]] || [[word:kadhawi|kadhawi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhawuthuth|kadhawuthuth]] || [[word:kadhawujuj|kadhawujuj]] || [[word:kadhawushush|kadhawushush]] || [[word:kadhaw|kadhaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhawuthu|kadhawuthu]] || [[word:kadhawuju|kadhawuju]] || [[word:kadhawushu|kadhawushu]] || [[word:kadhawu|kadhawu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhawufuth|kadhawufuth]] || [[word:kadhawufuj|kadhawufuj]] || [[word:kadhawufush|kadhawufush]] || [[word:kadhawuf|kadhawuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kadhawethe|kadhawethe]] || [[word:kadhaweje|kadhaweje]] || [[word:kadhaweshe|kadhaweshe]] || [[word:kadhawe|kadhawe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhawothoth|kadhawothoth]] || [[word:kadhawojoj|kadhawojoj]] || [[word:kadhawoshosh|kadhawoshosh]] || [[word:kadhaw|kadhaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhawotho|kadhawotho]] || [[word:kadhawojo|kadhawojo]] || [[word:kadhawosho|kadhawosho]] || [[word:kadhawo|kadhawo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhawofoth|kadhawofoth]] || [[word:kadhawofoj|kadhawofoj]] || [[word:kadhawofosh|kadhawofosh]] || [[word:kadhawof|kadhawof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhawïfïf|kadhawïfïf]] || [[word:kadhawïfïf|kadhawïfïf]] || [[word:kadhawïfïf|kadhawïfïf]] || [[word:kadhawïfïf|kadhawïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]] || [[word:kadhawïf|kadhawïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kadhawæthæ|kadhawæthæ]] || [[word:kadhawæjæ|kadhawæjæ]] || [[word:kadhawæshæ|kadhawæshæ]] || [[word:kadhawæ|kadhawæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhawathath|kadhawathath]] || [[word:kadhawajaj|kadhawajaj]] || [[word:kadhawashash|kadhawashash]] || [[word:kadhaw|kadhaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhawatha|kadhawatha]] || [[word:kadhawaja|kadhawaja]] || [[word:kadhawasha|kadhawasha]] || [[word:kadhawa|kadhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhawafath|kadhawafath]] || [[word:kadhawafaj|kadhawafaj]] || [[word:kadhawafash|kadhawafash]] || [[word:kadhawaf|kadhawaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kadhawasha|kadhawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokadhawasha|gokadhawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikadhawasha|gokikadhawasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kadhawnüsha|kadhawnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokadhawnknüsha|gokadhawnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhawnüsha|gokikadhawnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kadhawshësha|kadhawshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokadhawnkshësha|gokadhawnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikadhawshësha|gokikadhawshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhawrosha|kadhawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhawnkrosha|gokadhawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhawrosha|gokikadhawrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhawmusha|kadhawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhawnkmusha|gokadhawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhawmusha|gokikadhawmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kadhawsherasha|kadhawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokadhawnksherasha|gokadhawnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikadhawsherasha|gokikadhawsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kadhawngasha|kadhawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokadhawnkngasha|gokadhawnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikadhawngasha|gokikadhawngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kadhawyasha|kadhawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokadhawnkyasha|gokadhawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikadhawyasha|gokikadhawyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kadhawyamasha|kadhawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokadhawnkyamasha|gokadhawnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikadhawyamasha|gokikadhawyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kadhawnüshësha|kadhawnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokadhawnknüshësha|gokadhawnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikadhawnüshësha|gokikadhawnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhawnürosha|kadhawnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhawnknürosha|gokadhawnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhawnürosha|gokikadhawnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhawnümusha|kadhawnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhawnknümusha|gokadhawnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhawnümusha|gokikadhawnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kadhawshënüsha|kadhawshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokadhawnkshënüsha|gokadhawnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhawshënüsha|gokikadhawshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhawshërosha|kadhawshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhawnkshërosha|gokadhawnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhawshërosha|gokikadhawshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhawshëmusha|kadhawshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhawnkshëmusha|gokadhawnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhawshëmusha|gokikadhawshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kadhawronüsha|kadhawronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokadhawnkronüsha|gokadhawnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhawronüsha|gokikadhawronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kadhawroshësha|kadhawroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokadhawnkroshësha|gokadhawnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikadhawroshësha|gokikadhawroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kadhawromusha|kadhawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokadhawnkromusha|gokadhawnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikadhawromusha|gokikadhawromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kadhawmunüsha|kadhawmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokadhawnkmunüsha|gokadhawnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikadhawmunüsha|gokikadhawmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kadhawmushësha|kadhawmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokadhawnkmushësha|gokadhawnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikadhawmushësha|gokikadhawmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kadhawmurosha|kadhawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokadhawnkmurosha|gokadhawnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikadhawmurosha|gokikadhawmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kadhaw|kadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kædhæw|kædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokadhaw|hokadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokædhæw|hokædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokadhaw|hohokadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokædhæw|hohokædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nükadhaw|nükadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nükædhæw|nükædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünükadhaw|nünükadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünükædhæw|nünükædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïkadhaw|nïkadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïkædhæw|nïkædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïkadhaw|nïnïkadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïkædhæw|nïnïkædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukadhaw|lukadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukædhæw|lukædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukadhaw|lulukadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukædhæw|lulukædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likadhaw|likadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likædhæw|likædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikadhaw|lilikadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikædhæw|lilikædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokadhaw|kokadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokædhæw|kokædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokadhaw|kokokadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokædhæw|kokokædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekadhaw|kekadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekædhæw|kekædhæw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekadhaw|kekekadhaw]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekædhæw|kekekædhæw]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
